mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.md_data_relation ( target_id, target_type, target_category, experiment_id, data_name, data_type, data_file_path, device_id, device_info, sample_frequency, work_status, ext_attr, is_simulation, create_by ) VALUES ( #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{targetCategory}, #{experimentId}, #{dataName}, #{dataType}, #{dataFilePath}, #{deviceId}, #{deviceInfo}, #{sampleFrequency}, #{workStatus}, #{extAttr}, #{isSimulation}, #{createBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.md_data_relation SET target_id = #{targetId}, target_type = #{targetType}, target_category = #{targetCategory}, experiment_id = #{experimentId}, data_name = #{dataName}, data_type = #{dataType}, data_file_path = #{dataFilePath}, device_id = #{deviceId}, device_info = #{deviceInfo}, sample_frequency = #{sampleFrequency}, work_status = #{workStatus}, ext_attr = #{extAttr}, is_simulation = #{isSimulation} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, d.data_name, d.data_type, d.is_simulation, d.data_file_path, d.target_id, d.target_type, d.target_category, d.sample_frequency, d.work_status, d.ext_attr, d.create_time, d.data_type, d.create_by, e.experiment_id, e.experiment_name, e.start_time, e.location, e.content_desc, p.project_id, p.project_name FROM SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.md_data_relation d LEFT JOIN SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.d_experiment_info e ON d.experiment_id = e.experiment_id LEFT JOIN SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.d_project_info p ON e.project_id = p.project_id
AND d.id = #{id} AND d.data_name LIKE concat('%', #{dataName}, '%') AND p.project_id = #{projectId} AND d.experiment_id = #{experimentId} AND e.experiment_name LIKE concat('%', #{experimentName}, '%') AND e.create_by = #{createBy} AND d.is_simulation = #{isSimulation} AND d.work_status = #{workStatus}
AND date_format(d.create_time,'%y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginTime},'%y%m%d')
AND date_format(d.create_time,'%y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endTime},'%y%m%d')

SELECT d.id, d.data_name, d.data_type, d.is_simulation, d.data_file_path, d.target_id, d.target_type, d.target_category, d.sample_frequency, d.work_status, d.ext_attr, d.create_time, d.data_type, d.create_by, e.experiment_id, e.experiment_name, e.start_time, e.location, e.content_desc FROM SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.md_data_relation d LEFT JOIN SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.d_experiment_info e ON d.experiment_id = e.experiment_id WHERE d.id = #{id}

SELECT d.id, d.data_name, d.data_type, d.is_simulation, d.data_file_path, d.target_id, d.target_type, d.target_category, d.sample_frequency, d.work_status, d.ext_attr, d.create_time, d.data_type, d.create_by, e.experiment_id, e.experiment_name, e.start_time, e.location, e.content_desc FROM SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.md_data_relation d LEFT JOIN SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.d_experiment_info e ON d.experiment_id = e.experiment_id WHERE d.experiment_id = #{experimentId} AND d.data_file_path = #{dataFilePath}
